name: @mettadata/metta
description: A composable, context-aware, spec-driven development framework for AI-native software engineering

scripts.copy-templates: rm -rf dist/templates/workflows dist/templates/gates dist/templates/artifacts dist/templates/skills dist/templates/agents dist/templates/docs dist/templates/hooks && cp -r src/templates/workflows dist/templates/workflows && cp -r src/templates/gates dist/templates/gates && cp -r src/templates/artifacts dist/templates/artifacts && cp -r src/templates/skills dist/templates/skills && cp -r src/templates/agents dist/templates/agents && cp -r src/templates/docs dist/templates/docs && cp -r src/templates/hooks dist/templates/hooks
